items.description:
The Halloween Winter Cap blends seasonal fun with chilly style—small and cozy, this cap is perfect for autumn nights, haunted maps, or winter-holiday builds. Its subtle pumpkins and frosty accents make it a standout piece for roleplay, casual looks, or just adding a festive twist to your avatar.
